daily_fact: Stay engaged with your community through local news and civic participation.
topline_md: New York City faces significant disruptions due to a blizzard, with over two feet of snow reported, emergency snow equipment deployed, and power outages affecting NJ and NYC, while local authorities manage public safety and transportation challenges.
